contract: Show severity, evidence, and next action without decorative layout.
List local artifacts with clear type and path.
Keep the local review center dense, readable, evidence-focused, and free of decorative controls.
Collect only the source text path, source type, review goal, review depth, optional context, and explicit local-write confirmation.
Show local validation failures without exposing full source text or command strings.
Make local-only, no-provider, no-upload, no-shell, and gate-neutral boundaries visible near source intake.
Summarize generated local proposal artifacts by count and type while hiding paths in the normal UI.
Change Control Center display language only; never translate source evidence, provider text, or generated reviews.
Show the fixed repository settings location and current locale state without accepting caller-controlled paths.
